chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 30 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of MA 184/2014. 3. For hearing of main case. 10.04.2019. Mr. Noor Ahmed Memon, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G. alongwith Inspector Zulfiqar Baloch on behalf of SSP Tando Muhammad Khan, Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad Range and ASI Bashir Ahmed Shaikh on behalf of SHO Tando Muhammad Khan. = Learned A.A.G. has filed the specific comments of SSP Tando Muhammad Khan / respondent No.9 to the effect that he has not harassed the petitioner nor has made any interference in the business of Tando Muhammad Khan Sugar Mill. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he will be satisfied if the petition is disposed of in the light of such statement. Accordingly, petition is disposed of in the light of statement made by respondent No.9 SSP Tando Muhammad Khan with the directions that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioner and violation of this order would expose the respondents to contempt proceedings. The petition in terms as stated above, stands disposed of alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail/PA
